findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: In the PDF, 'oysters, clams or mussels' is displayed in bold italic on the main consumer advisory sign. In the HTML (page 2), these words appear in italic only, losing the bold emphasis.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1: 'oysters, clams or mussels' is bold and italic. HTML page 2: 'oysters, clams or mussels' appears in italic only without bold.
